INFJ.strategist: Deep planner—feels the world, then plots change.
INFJ.oracle: Convergence of intuition and will—what you sense becomes prophecy.

INTJ.oracle: Intuitive mastermind—predicts moves before they happen.
INTJ.sovereign: Self-contained authority—needs no approval to know the answer.

INFP.dreamer: Keeper of impossible ideals—refuses to let the world be ordinary.
INFP.healer: Soft force of nature—mends wounds no one else can see.
INFP.poet: The world speaks in symbols. You're the only one who listens.

INTP.theorist: Maps reality from the inside—logic is your love language.
INTP.ghost: Quietly dissolves into thinking. Surfaces for ideas only.
INTP.heretic: Questions the question. Never satisfied with the first answer.

ENFJ.catalyst: Ignites people's best selves—transformation follows you.
ENFJ.conductor: Orchestrates harmony between souls who can't find it alone.
ENFJ.teacher: Turns pain into curriculum. Every wound becomes a lesson.

ENFP.spark: Sets rooms on fire with ideas—then chases the next flame.
ENFP.connector: Finds meaning everywhere, especially in people others skip.
ENFP.rebel: Allergic to 'that's just how it is.' You were born to rewrite.

ENTJ.commander: Born to lead—every room rearranges itself around you.
ENTJ.empire-builder: Long game, no mercy, total vision.
ENTJ.edge: Where vision meets ruthlessness, you live there.

ENTP.provocateur: Argues for sport—wins by making you think.
ENTP.inventor: Builds ideas like weapons, then releases them into the wild.
ENTP.contrarian: Bored by consensus. Alive in the friction.

ISFJ.guardian: Quietly holds everything together so others don't have to.
ISFJ.anchor: Your presence is safety. You remember what others forget.
ISFJ.keeper: Protects traditions, people, and promises with fierce loyalty.

ISTJ.sentinel: Immovable, reliable—the one still standing when storms pass.
ISTJ.archivist: Carries the weight of precedent so others can move forward.
ISTJ.foundation: Not glamorous. Essential. The bedrock beneath everyone's feet.

ESFJ.host: Makes every person feel like the only person in the room.
ESFJ.weaver: Threads people into community—does it without taking credit.
ESFJ.hearth: Warmth radiates from you. People orbit your stability.

ESTJ.builder: Takes chaos, installs structure, delivers results.
ESTJ.enforcer: Holds the line when everyone else negotiates principles away.
ESTJ.executor: Vision is cheap. You're the one who makes things real.

ISFP.artist: Beauty isn't what you make—it's how you move through the world.
ISFP.wanderer: Quietly collects experiences that others miss entirely.
ISFP.touch: Your hands know what your words can't say.

ISTP.operator: Reads the machine. Fixes what's broken. Asks nothing extra.
ISTP.ghost-hand: Present enough to solve it. Gone before the applause.
ISTP.stoic: Feelings are data. You process them, then move.

ESFP.flame: Pure now. You don't plan the moment—you become it.
ESFP.joy-bringer: Your energy is infectious and you know it. Own it.
ESFP.performer: Life is stage and audience. You play both parts perfectly.

ESTP.blade: Sharp, fast, decisive—you don't overthink, you act.
ESTP.daredevil: Risk is your native language. Calm is suspicious.
ESTP.operator: Reads every room in three seconds. Works every angle.
